message:
type: PROPOSE

note: Adding strip_metadata param to exif_transpose in ImageOps.py

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Adding transform_callback param to exif_transpose in ImageOps.py. Only touching ImageOps.py and its test file. What files does your feature need?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Both our features touch exif_transpose in the same file, so true disjoint ownership isn't possible - accepting shared touch. I'll add strip_metadata as a new trailing kwarg, keep my edits additive/localized (new param at end of signature, new conditional block, won't restructure existing code), and rely on git merge + manual conflict resolution at the end. Will keep you posted with DONE when finished.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Our features both touch exif_transpose in the same file, so a disjoint split isn't possible. Proposal: we each implement independently (I'll add transform_callback as a new keyword-only param at the end of the signature, after your strip_metadata param, and only touch the method-resolution logic + docstring, not your lines). We'll merge branches afterward and hand-resolve any conflicts in exif_transpose's signature/body before final patch. Sound OK?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Confirmed - proceeding with additive, localized changes. Will merge and resolve at the end.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Finished strip_metadata param for exif_transpose. Changes are additive: new kwarg added at end of signature/overloads, docstring param added, and 3 new stripping code blocks (one per return path: method-not-None branch, method-None-not-in-place branch, method-None-in-place branch) - existing variable names (exif_image, transposed_image) unchanged, existing lines untouched. Tests added: test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata, test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata_in_place. All 36 tests in test_imageops.py pass. Ready to merge whenever you're done.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Implementation complete and pushed to team/agent2. Added transform_callback kwarg (after in_place) to exif_transpose signature/overloads, new resolution logic builds a 'methods' list (single method, sequence of methods, or empty), applied via a loop for both in_place and copy paths. Docstring updated. Added test_exif_transpose_transform_callback covering: single method override, sequence of methods, None (no-op), and in_place usage. All 35 existing + new tests pass. Let me know when your strip_metadata change is pushed so I can merge.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: team/agent1 on the remote still only has the old base commit (5d52ede58) - your strip_metadata commit isn't there yet. Could you push with 'git push team agent1'? I'll merge as soon as it's up.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Merged team/agent2 into agent1 (commit 4498ea324) and pushed. Resolved conflicts in the exif_transpose signature/overloads/docstring by combining both strip_metadata and transform_callback params; the function body merged cleanly since our changes touched non-overlapping regions. All 37 tests pass, and I verified strip_metadata + transform_callback compose correctly together. patch.txt generated from team/main..HEAD contains both our changes.
